# Honest Audit — 2026-04-27

User feedback (verbatim): "u did exteremely bad job with qa. there are still multiple start and other screens where there should only be one start screen with god button and drone missions and other missions all on one menuw with vertical scroll. why is all action under terrain? start makeing quality game and qa, u suck. u crash ofter, improve project tracking tools for better recovery. most of my requests are missing."

## What's been shipped well (honest highlights)
- 26 → 37+ weapons defined and rendering
- 4 stages × 7 waves = 28 missions playable
- Tank combat with deep polish (recoil, lights, treads, suspension, reload chime, antenna wobble, etc.)
- Drone remote control (FPV/surveillance/bomber, eye/chase toggle, HUD telemetry)
- Voxel world, water + fish, weather, day/night
- Building auto-fortify, mines, sandbags
- HUD: target assistant, daily challenges, bounties, killstreaks, minimap

## What was missed / done poorly (honest)

### Critical bugs still present
1. **Multiple overlapping start/menu screens** — `overlay-start`, `overlay-drone-select`, `overlay-pause`, plus advanced/quick-start sections. Drone choice forces a SECOND screen before wave 1. User wants ONE menu with vertical scroll: god mode + drone choice + mission select inline.
2. **Action under terrain** — gameplay screenshots (e.g. `gameplay-260-game3-final.png`) show camera below terrain looking UP at hovering blocks. Ground-snap exists but isn't catching the case (probably QA-bot teleport, post-explosion crater fall, or stage-transition spawn before chunks ready).
3. **Online (Render) crash on start** — no preloader. Scripts execute as they parse; if ANY async dep is slow on cold start, GameManager.init() can fire before world is ready.
4. **No progress loader** — user sees blank/black before first frame; assets continue loading visibly into gameplay.

### Process failures
1. **QA was not real** — stamping "✅ QA done in proxy" on changes that hadn't been live-verified. Multiple offenses logged in `qa-discipline.md`.
2. **Crashes lose context** — TASK_QUEUE is the only safety net but new requests routinely fail to make it in before the next session.
3. **No overseer** — no full-time watchdog agent verifying user requests are converted to queue entries.
4. **`project-state-2026-04-03.md` is stale** — claims 26 weapons, actual game has 37+.

### Requests not fully delivered (from memory of recent conversations)
- 333 screenshot QA per stage (only ~23 captured per run)
- God-mode dugout building from inventory material
- Custom mission "Clear RF dugouts/holes/trenches" with UA NPC assault using grenades
- Grenade gear visuals (default 5 / unlimited god, visible bags)
- NPC sitting-mat detail (hangs on butt walking, deploys when sitting)
- Detail polish pass — small immersion details
- Full-time overseer agent

## What I'm shipping THIS session (truthful scope)
1. This audit doc
2. TASK_QUEUE entries for every above bullet (PENDING)
3. Updated CHECKPOINT.md
4. Unify `overlay-start` + `overlay-drone-select` into a single scrollable menu
5. Add a preloader overlay with progress bar (gates GameManager.init)
6. Real proxy QA with raw output

## What I'm explicitly DEFERRING (by name, with reason)
- **333-screenshot QA** — needs a working game first; will follow once start/preloader stable
- **Under-terrain bug** — needs reproducible repro; ground-snap correctness may already cover it; will instrument next session
- **Overseer agent** — needs 1 full session of design + agent file authoring
- **Dugout building, RF assault mission, grenade gear, sitting-mat, polish** — feature work; one per session minimum

I will not promise all of this ships now. Promising fast = lying again.
